name: s-gw
description: Local s-gw plugin that lets coding agents use typed secret handles without receiving raw credentials.

interface.shortDescription: Keep secrets local while agents act through handles.
interface.longDescription: s-gw runs locally on your machine. It detects secrets, creates typed unique handles, requires local approval for secret-backed actions, executes approved operations locally, and returns only sanitized results or completion proofs to coding agents.
defaultPrompt: Use s-gw to scan this repo for secrets and return handles only.
Use s-gw to list available local secret handles.
Use s-gw to request a secret-backed command without seeing the secret value.
